eligibilityNotes: Normalized from the European Commission Access2Markets tariff endpoint for HS 820830, origin Canada, destination Germany, retrieved 2026-03-13.
Germany is used as the representative EU member-state destination because the official endpoint requires a member-state code even though customs duties are part of the EU common customs tariff.
MFN basis is the ERGA OMNES third-country duty shown as 1.70%; the Canada tariff preference shown in the same snapshot is 0% from 2017-09-21.
source: European Commission Access2Markets tariff endpoint (CA -> DE snapshot)

eligibilityNotes: Normalized from the European Commission Access2Markets tariff endpoint for HS 090121, origin Canada, destination Germany, retrieved 2026-03-13.
Germany is used as the representative EU member-state destination because the official endpoint requires a member-state code even though customs duties are part of the EU common customs tariff.
MFN basis is the ERGA OMNES third-country duty shown as 7.50%; the Canada tariff preference shown in the same snapshot is 0% from 2017-09-21.

The same source snapshot lists an additional-duty measure tied to exports from the Russian Federation or Belarus; that contingent measure is not used as the base EU tariff rate in this normalized record.
source: European Commission Access2Markets tariff endpoint (CA -> DE snapshot)

eligibilityNotes: Normalized from the European Commission Access2Markets tariff endpoint for HS 610910, origin Canada, destination Germany, retrieved 2026-03-13.
Germany is used as the representative EU member-state destination because the official endpoint requires a member-state code even though customs duties are part of the EU common customs tariff.

The source returns both 'T-shirts' and 'Other' product branches, but both branches show the same 12.00% ERGA OMNES duty and 0% Canada tariff preference, so the prototype normalizes the shared result at HS 6109.10.
The same snapshot also shows a 2026 Canada preferential tariff quota path at 0% with an Annex 5-A commercial-document reference requirement.
source: European Commission Access2Markets tariff endpoint (CA -> DE snapshot)

agreement: EU common customs tariff MFN already zero for the normalized base duty outcome
